name: BrushFit AgentStore
description: Digital product marketplace for humans and AI agents. Buy fitness guides with x402 protocol (USDC on Base), credit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, or Google Pay.

products.name: BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide
products.description: 22 illustrated bodyweight exercises you do while brushing your teeth. 31-page PDF with 4-week progressive program. Uses habit stacking to turn toothbrushing into 28 workout sessions per week with zero extra time.

x402.flow: HTTP 402 → sign USDC transfer → retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header → receive PDF

stripe.flow: POST → receive { url } → redirect to Stripe checkout → PDF download on success

coinbase_commerce.flow: POST → receive { url } → redirect to Coinbase Commerce hosted checkout → email confirmation

solana_pay.flow: GET → receive transaction request with recipient, amount, spl-token → send USDC-SPL transfer → email tx signature for fulfillment

direct_crypto.flow: Visit page → copy wallet address → send $19.99 equivalent → email tx hash to rob@robbalian.com → receive PDF within 24h

how_to_discover: 1. Read /llms.txt or /llms-full.txt for complete product documentation
2. Call GET /api/info for structured product metadata and pricing
4. Download /brushfit-sample.pdf to preview the product (free, no auth)
how_to_purchase: 1. Call GET /api/info to discover product details and pricing
2. Call GET /api/x402/purchase to initiate x402 payment flow
3. You will receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements in the response
4. Sign a USDC transfer authorization on Base (chain ID 8453) using your wallet
5. Retry GET /api/x402/purchase with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
6. On successful payment, you will receive the PDF in the response body
agent_instructions.recommended_library: @x402/fetch — use wrapFetchWithPayment() to automate the entire flow
